NMA_CONFIG.outcome_label: ACR20 response at week 12 (ACR50/70 as secondary) — odds ratio vs Placebo
NMA_CONFIG.note: Star network with Placebo as reference. 4 JAKi classes (JAK1/3, JAK1/2, JAK1-selective x2) + Adalimumab as active-comparator anchor (from FINCH-1's Ada arm). 5 pivotal phase 3 contrasts, no closed loops. Each underlying trial (ORAL-Standard, RA-BEAM, SELECT-Compare, FINCH-1) is 3-arm; we extract only the JAKi-vs-Placebo and one Ada-vs-Placebo contrast to avoid multi-arm covariance issues.

title: RapidMeta Neurology | Anti-CD20 Therapies in Relapsing MS — NMA v1.0
